finding_summary: Photo send works but first trial is not the shortest path
exact_evidence: listing_video/start_video with awaiting=style_selection
recommended_fix: Default style or defer style choice until preview/revision

finding_summary: App/setup confusion is answered with generic welcome
exact_evidence: Is this an app? How do I use this? -> first_contact/welcome
recommended_fix: Add a trust/setup intent with one short answer plus one next step

finding_summary: Security question is not answered directly
exact_evidence: How do I know this is secure and not spam? -> first_contact/welcome
recommended_fix: Return a direct trust answer and only then a starter task

finding_summary: Form is positioned as setup before value
exact_evidence: Invite says I need 60 seconds of your time and form says takes about 1 minute
recommended_fix: Reframe onboarding as optional acceleration not entry gate

finding_summary: Video-first landing entry is not implemented as a real surface
exact_evidence: No landing page code exists and no single CTA can be reviewed
recommended_fix: Either build the page or keep first-use choice inside chat

finding_summary: Insight-first landing path is promised but not implemented
exact_evidence: Only concept pack exists and there is no real CTA surface
recommended_fix: Do path recommendation in OpenClaw until a real landing entry exists

finding_summary: Interview-first exists only as concept and not as runnable starter-task surface
exact_evidence: Mock task card exists but no console or API surface produces it
recommended_fix: Expose starter tasks in OpenClaw and a recommendation contract in backend

finding_summary: Exact daily insight command works but the lane is fragile
exact_evidence: daily insight -> daily_insight/start_daily_insight while hints promise unsupported refinements
recommended_fix: Support or remove refinement commands before scaling insight-first

finding_summary: Natural photo send is accepted but still blocked by style choice
exact_evidence: listing_video/start_video with style_selection
recommended_fix: Auto-recommend style and let user adjust later

finding_summary: Pricing question is dodged instead of answered
exact_evidence: How much is this per month? -> first_contact/welcome
recommended_fix: Add explicit pricing/trial intent and a short ROI-safe reply

finding_summary: There is no real low-risk passive entry surface yet
exact_evidence: No implemented landing page or single CTA exists
recommended_fix: Use skip-the-form chat entry until a real passive surface ships

finding_summary: Resisting users have no try-before-fill escape hatch
exact_evidence: Form and done page both point only to later setup or later video use
recommended_fix: Offer skip path and dual CTA after form completion

finding_summary: Video-first path still risks asking too much before showing value
exact_evidence: Current first step is style choice not first sample or first win
recommended_fix: Compress missing-info collection into one turn after momentum is established

finding_summary: Sample-before-preference path is not implemented
exact_evidence: Only mock packs show the idea and the product still asks for style up front
recommended_fix: Move style calibration after first sample or first draft

finding_summary: Progress phase risks sounding like an internal job log
exact_evidence: V4 uses SCRIPTING COMPLETE style messages that feel technical and cold
recommended_fix: Map internal steps to conversational progress states with time anchors

finding_summary: Delivery format can feel publishable when the content quality is good
exact_evidence: V1 caption and hashtags feel agent-authored and easy to scan
recommended_fix: Use V1 as the delivery quality bar and preserve that structure in OpenClaw rendering

finding_summary: Revision lane is unstable after delivery
exact_evidence: make it more professional -> style_selection/set_style
recommended_fix: Prioritize revision intent in delivered context and keep adjust inside the same lane

finding_summary: Insight can start quickly only for the exact command not for natural phrasing
exact_evidence: daily insight works but mixed phrasing is misrouted
recommended_fix: Broaden insight intent recognition before pushing this path

finding_summary: The good insight pack is local and usable which proves the lane can be valuable
exact_evidence: I1 headline and caption feel timely and local
recommended_fix: Keep local relevance as the default bar and reject generic insight drafts

finding_summary: Insight refinement and publish affordances are not contract-safe
exact_evidence: shorter is rejected and more professional is routed as style_selection
recommended_fix: Freeze supported commands and test every user-visible hint end to end

finding_summary: Insight-to-video handoff is not surfaced anywhere real
exact_evidence: Good branch recommendation exists only in mock pack and form completion pushes only video later
recommended_fix: Add a post-insight CTA that offers the best next video task

finding_summary: Third-use experience is not visibly lighter than first use
exact_evidence: System stores profile fields but not path preference or activation history
recommended_fix: Persist and use path preference after a successful first-use path

finding_summary: Tenth-use revision still falls back to setup semantics
exact_evidence: Delivered revision text still becomes style_selection
recommended_fix: Track revision intent as behavioral memory not only field memory

finding_summary: Twentieth-use assistant mindshare is not visible in any surface
exact_evidence: No console surface shows confidence path history or learning
recommended_fix: Make growth visible to both operators and users

finding_summary: Referral willingness is blocked by trust and path confusion
exact_evidence: App price security and first-step questions all miss today
recommended_fix: Fix trust-first questions before expecting word-of-mouth growth

finding_summary: Dashboard shows readiness but not recommended path
exact_evidence: Only completeness and video/insight ready badges are rendered
recommended_fix: Add recommended path and next action per client

finding_summary: Client detail is field-centric rather than next-step-centric
exact_evidence: Pending sections are grouped by collection channel not by activation goal
recommended_fix: Show one recommended next move before any field list or skill brief edit

finding_summary: Operator onboarding overstates readiness and setup value
exact_evidence: UI shows 视频就绪 and 洞察就绪 when link is merely sent
recommended_fix: Separate form sent from activation successful and route next trial explicitly

finding_summary: Skill brief editing is powerful but too internal for ordinary ops work
exact_evidence: UI exposes large prompt-like brief editors with bytes and reset actions
recommended_fix: Move most ops guidance to structured recommendations not freeform brief editing
